assertions.title: Context-sensitive confidence — labeled EIN vs. unlabeled

steps.action: Upload rerun fixture with labeled 'EIN: 12-3456789' and standalone '98-7654321'
steps.expected: Labeled EIN is red REDACT and standalone EIN is amber UNCERTAIN
steps.observed: Two EIN highlights rendered, but both had REDACT decision and red styling; no amber UNCERTAIN EIN present

assertions.issues: UNCERTAIN state was not applied to the standalone EIN; both matches were auto-redacted.

steps.action: Upload rerun fixture with 'Account Number: 123456789012' and standalone '987654321012'
steps.expected: Only the labeled account value is highlighted; label and standalone number are not highlighted
steps.observed: Exactly one bank-account highlight rendered (sidebar Bank account ×1), aligned to the labeled value only; standalone number did not produce a second highlight

frictions.description: Hidden input[type=file] is not interactable from default interactive snapshot.
frictions.resolution: Temporarily exposed the existing input element via in-session DOM style changes before each upload (no app source edits).
